name: Yash High Voltage Ltd : Transformer Guardians

posts.author: Debojit_Kangsa_Banik
posts.community: Yash High Voltage Ltd : Transformer Guardians
posts.text: Concall Q4FY26 Insights No impact of current war as no exports in those areas No impact on RM side as well, able to pass on the price Capable to grow at 40-42% for next 4-5 years concall3 830×327 43.2 KB This year Ebitda to remain around 24-25% coz of new factory Margin expansion likely from next year Revenue for totally indigenous made RIP bushings from our own factory might be towards the end of this year financial The revenue from this plant will still begin as we would be able to utilize the facility for assembly and testing from next month itself concall4 840×287 39.1 KB Present capacity…

posts.author: Manik_Gupta
posts.community: Yash High Voltage Ltd : Transformer Guardians
posts.text: It is expected that In forward 1.5 -2 years, revenue will get double as greenfield capacity units will get live. PAT margin % will definitely improve as greenfield capacity includes production of capacitive core which is currently being imported in India. Capacitive core is a one of the parts of RIP bushing which is more than 80% product mix of Yash Highvoltage.
